title: toona sureni var. inodora
intro: Toona sureni var. inodora, also known as Toona sureni, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Toona sureni var. inodora is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to manage various health benefits, including relieving respiratory problems and reducing inflammation.
